storyboard.content: I've been having intense chest pain that feels like an elephant sitting on my chest for the last hour.
The pain is spreading to my left arm and jaw.
I'm very short of breath and sweating a lot.
I feel nauseated on top of the chest pain.
This came on suddenly about an hour ago and is not getting better even after sitting down.
The pain is about an 8 out of 10 and I can't do anything normally. I've never felt anything like this before.
I'm a 58-year-old man and I am overweight.
